title: Database Integration Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of SQL vs NoSQL differences and the role of ORMs/ODMs like Prisma and Mongoose for clean JavaScript-based data interaction.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily purpose of a Database in a web application?
options: To store information permanently (like users, posts, or messages) that must persist across project restarts.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which type of database stores data in a flexible, JSON-like format and is often used for fast-scaling projects?
A library that allows you to interact with your data using regular JavaScript objects instead of raw SQL code is called a(n) ________.
Which and/or what was the primarily benefit of using a tool like Prisma (an ORM) in a professional project?
options: It provides strong type safety and makes data queries much easier to write and maintain.

questions.question: Does following the 'Database Integration' pattern help build truly Fullstack applications by allowing you to persist user data across sessions?
options: Yes, as it is a core feature of any modern web application.
